'''ân-ch-ch-d''' ('''kanachchedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voolay|voolay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voolay|voolay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-ch-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanachchedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinachedoko|thinachedoko]] || [[word:jinachedoko|jinachedoko]] || [[word:shinachedoko|shinachedoko]] || [[word:kinachedoko|kinachedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnachedoko|thĂŠnachedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnachedoko|jĂŠnachedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnachedoko|shĂŠnachedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnachedoko|kĂŠnachedoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
